'''鈭歾h-j-k-h''' ('''kazhajkehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:outbash|outbash]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-j-k-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:outbash|outbash]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-j-k-h
|-
! Lemma
| kazhajkehoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhajkehoko|thizhajkehoko]] || [[word:jizhajkehoko|jizhajkehoko]] || [[word:shizhajkehoko|shizhajkehoko]] || [[word:kizhajkehoko|kizhajkehoko]]
|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
